entries.section: Stat Ceilings and Floors — stress test design choice
entries.quoted_text: Stat range 1-7 (scale width 6). Mild perturbation = ±1 step, bounded by per-stat floor/ceiling.

entries.quoted_text: Stat range 1-7 (scale width 6). Moderate perturbation = ±2 steps, bounded by per-stat floor/ceiling.

entries.section: Starting Values — stress test design choice
entries.quoted_text: MS range 0-100, canonical start 72. Mild delta ±8 keeps starting range [64, 80] — within safe operating band, below rupture threshold.

entries.section: Starting Values — stress test design choice
entries.quoted_text: MS range 0-100, canonical start 72. Moderate delta ±15 keeps starting range [57, 87].

entries.section: Starting Values — stress test design choice
entries.quoted_text: MS range 0-100, canonical start 72. Extreme delta ±25 gives starting range [47, 97] — tests near-rupture openings.

15 playable territories (T1-T14, T17). Mild: 0-1 random swaps between factions. Constraint: each faction retains >=1 territory post-swap.
15 playable territories. Moderate: 1-3 random swaps. Constraint: each faction retains >=1 territory post-swap.
15 playable territories. Extreme: 3-5 random swaps. Constraint: each faction retains >=1 territory post-swap.
